title: Bushy Grapevines
description: A Bushy Leaves add-on for [Let's Do] Vinery that makes grapevines bushy!
body:
An add-on for [Bushy Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bushy-leaves) resource pack that makes [[Let's Do] Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery)'s and [[Let's Do] Nether Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-nethervinery)'s grapevines bushy! Originally a part of the main Bushy Leaves pack, now split into a separate pack.

#
**This pack does not require OptiFine or any of its alternatives to work.**
#
